__meta.source: FRED — Federal Reserve Economic Data (synthetic fixture for refinery testing; not for production analysis)
__meta.note: Florida state-level indicators (FLUR + FL LFPR). Series ids align with real FRED series so the live swap is one-line. National indicators (SOFR, CPI YoY) live in macro-us.sample.json.

rows.label: Florida Unemployment Rate
rows.context: Florida labor market remains tight, ~80bp below the national rate; tourism and construction continue to absorb new entrants.

rows.label: Florida Labor Force Participation Rate
rows.context: Florida LFPR has climbed ~80bp over 12 months — retirement-state demographics make this an unusually positive read.
